project.name: Unconfigured OpenCollab Project
project.output: Replace this template with the task brief from the target project repository.
project.audience: A team using OpenCollab as a local visualizer
project.collaborationMode: OpenCollab parent repo stays local; the task folder stores the task brief and JSON dataset.

brief.assignment: Paste or summarize the target project task brief here during /ocb init.

classificationHints: Use dependency edges when one artifact must exist before another can be accurate.
Use boundary edges when two owners touch the same concept, claim, file, or interface.
Use sync edges when active tasks need a short alignment meeting.
